dotnet-fx-migration.name: .NET Framework to Modern .NET Migration
dotnet-fx-migration.description: Orchestrates end-to-end .NET Framework to modern .NET migration via a 7-phase workflow.
dotnet-fx-migration.author: fx2dotnet

fx-assessment.name: .NET Solution Assessment
fx-assessment.description: Assesses a .NET solution for migration readiness, dependency structure, and package compatibility.
fx-assessment.author: fx2dotnet

fx-migration-planner.name: .NET Migration Planner
fx-migration-planner.description: Synthesizes assessment findings into a phased migration plan.
fx-migration-planner.author: fx2dotnet

fx-sdk-conversion.name: .NET SDK-Style Project Conversion
fx-sdk-conversion.description: Converts a legacy .NET project file to SDK-style format and hands off build repair.
fx-sdk-conversion.author: fx2dotnet

fx-package-compat.name: .NET Package Compatibility Migration
fx-package-compat.description: Executes a chunked package compatibility migration plan and validates each chunk.
fx-package-compat.author: fx2dotnet

fx-multitarget.name: .NET Multitarget Migration
fx-multitarget.description: Adds modern target frameworks to a project and fixes compatibility issues incrementally.
fx-multitarget.author: fx2dotnet

fx-aspnet-web.name: ASP.NET Framework to ASP.NET Core Web Migration
fx-aspnet-web.description: Migrates a legacy ASP.NET Framework web host to ASP.NET Core in controlled slices.
fx-aspnet-web.author: fx2dotnet

fx-build-fix.name: .NET Build Fix
fx-build-fix.description: Runs a build and minimal-fix loop to repair the current migration step.
fx-build-fix.author: fx2dotnet

fx-route-inventory.name: Legacy ASP.NET Route Inventory
fx-route-inventory.description: Extracts a route and endpoint inventory from a legacy ASP.NET project.
fx-route-inventory.author: fx2dotnet

fx-project-detector.name: .NET Project Type Detector
fx-project-detector.description: Classifies a .NET project type and reports SDK-style status.
fx-project-detector.author: fx2dotnet
